parsed.production_notes: The video combines human-recorded footage with an AI-generated clip. The bottom panel in the first scene features an AI-generated man with a robotic arm, showing unnatural smoothness and typical AI rendering artifacts in the face and the steam rising from the mug.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, slim build, brown complexion. He has short, curly black hair, a beard, and a mustache.
characters.wardrobe: Teal and white horizontally striped t-shirt.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, medium build, brown complexion. He has short dark hair and a neat beard. He has a visible robotic right arm.

scenes.setting: Top: Outdoor, under a metal roof, white wall. Bottom: Indoor, near a window, bookshelf in background.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A stands outdoors under a corrugated metal roof, with a plain white wall behind him. He is looking down at a black smartphone held in both hands. He appears to be speaking while looking at the phone. The lighting is natural daylight, casting soft shadows.

Character C sits indoors near a bright window. Behind him is a bookshelf filled with books and a trailing potted plant. He has a distinct robotic right arm made of metal and plastic components. He holds a white ceramic mug with his robotic hand, brings it to his mouth, and drinks. Steam rises from the mug. He smiles broadly after taking a sip.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen showing two different scenes. The top half features a man outdoors looking at his phone and speaking. The bottom half shows a man indoors with a robotic arm drinking from a steaming mug. Text overlays appear on both halves.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ನಾನು ಇಲ್ಲಿಗೆ ಕಾಫಿ ಕುಡಿಯಕ್ಕೆ ಬಂದೆ [I came here to have coffee.]
Character C says: I came here to have coffee.
Character A says: ಈ ಕಾಫಿ ತುಂಬಾ ಬಿಸಿಯಾಗಿದೆ [This coffee is very hot.]
Character C says: This coffee is very hot.
Character A says: ನನಗೆ ಈ ಕಾಫಿಯ ರುಚಿ ತುಂಬಾ ಇಷ್ಟವಾಯಿತು [I really like the taste of this coffee.]
Character C says: I really like the taste of this coffee.

scenes.visual_description: A medium close-up of a man standing outdoors, giving a detailed explanation. Text overlays appear at the bottom of the screen, changing as he speaks.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ಇದೊಂದು ಆಪ್ [This is an app.]
Character A says: ಇಲ್ಲಿ AI ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಟೀಚರ್ ಜೊತೆ ನೀವು ಡೈಲಿ [Here, with the AI English teacher, you can daily]
Character A says: ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡಬಹುದು [practice.]
Character A says: ಇವತ್ತಿನ ಕಾಲದಲ್ಲಿ [In today's times,]
Character A says: ನಮಗೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಇಲ್ಲ ಅಂದ್ರೆ [if we don't know English,]
Character A says: ನಮ್ಮ ಕೆಲಸ ಕೂಡ ಸಿಗಲ್ಲ [we won't even get a job,]
Character A says: ರೆಸ್ಪೆಕ್ಟ್ ಕೂಡ ಸಿಗಲ್ಲ [nor will we get respect.]
Character A says: ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಇಲ್ಲ ಅಂದ್ರೆ [If there is no English,]
Character A says: ಜಾಬ್ ಮತ್ತು ರೆಸ್ಪೆಕ್ಟ್ ಸಿಗಲ್ಲ ಅಂತ [that you won't get a job and respect,]
Character A says: ನಿನಗೂ ಗೊತ್ತಿದೆ ಅಲ್ವಾ [you also know that, right?]
Character B says: ಹೌದು [Yes.]
Character A says: ಅದಕ್ಕಾಗಿ ನಾನು SpeakX ಅಲ್ಲಿ [That's why I, on SpeakX,]
Character A says: AI ಟೀಚರ್ ಜೊತೆ [with the AI teacher,]
Character A says: ದಿನಕ್ಕೆ 10 ಟು 15 ಮಿನಿಟ್ಸ್ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಾ ಇದೀನಿ [am practicing for 10 to 15 minutes a day.]
Character A says: ಈಗ ಕೇವಲ 10 ದಿನಗಳಾಗಿದೆ [Now it's been only 10 days.]
Character A says: ನನ್ನ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ತುಂಬಾ ಇಂಪ್ರೂವ್ ಆಗಿದೆ [My English has improved a lot.]
Character A says: ಈಗ ಭಯ ಇಲ್ಲ [Now there is no fear.]
Character A says: ಕಾನ್ಫಿಡೆಂಟ್ ಆಗಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡೋಕೆ ಆಗುತ್ತೆ [I can speak English confidently.]
Character A says: ಇದು ತುಂಬಾ ಅಫೋರ್ಡಬಲ್ ಇದೆ [This is very affordable.]
Character A says: ದಿನಕ್ಕೆ ಕೇವಲ 4 ರೂಪಾಯಿ ಮಾತ್ರ [Only 4 rupees per day.]
Character A says: ನಮಗೆ 7 ದಿನ ಟ್ರಯಲ್ ಕೂಡ ಸಿಗುತ್ತೆ [We also get a 7-day trial.]
Character A says: ಕಾನ್ಫಿಡೆಂಟ್ ಆಗಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡಬಹುದು [You can speak English confidently.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
ಇದೊಂದು ಆಪ್ (This is an app.)
ಇಲ್ಲಿ AI ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಟೀಚರ್ ಜೊತೆ ನೀವು ಡೈಲಿ (Here, with the AI English teacher, you can daily)
ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡಬಹುದು (practice.)
ಇವತ್ತಿನ ಕಾಲದಲ್ಲಿ (In today's times,)
ನಮಗೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಇಲ್ಲ ಅಂದ್ರೆ (if we don't know English,)
ನಮ್ಮ ಕೆಲಸ ಕೂಡ ಸಿಗಲ್ಲ (we won't even get a job,)
ರೆಸ್ಪೆಕ್ಟ್ ಕೂಡ ಸಿಗಲ್ಲ (nor will we get respect.)
ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಇಲ್ಲ ಅಂದ್ರೆ (If there is no English,)
ಜಾಬ್ ಮತ್ತು ರೆಸ್ಪೆಕ್ಟ್ ಸಿಗಲ್ಲ ಅಂತ (that you won't get a job and respect,)
ನಿನಗೂ ಗೊತ್ತಿದೆ ಅಲ್ವಾ (you also know that, right?)
ಹೌದು (Yes.)
ಅದಕ್ಕಾಗಿ ನಾನು SpeakX ಅಲ್ಲಿ (That's why I, on SpeakX,)
AI ಟೀಚರ್ ಜೊತೆ (with the AI teacher,)
ದಿನಕ್ಕೆ 10 ಟು 15 ಮಿನಿಟ್ಸ್ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಾ ಇದೀನಿ (am practicing for 10 to 15 minutes a day.)
ಈಗ ಕೇವಲ 10 ದಿನಗಳಾಗಿದೆ (Now it's been only 10 days.)
ನನ್ನ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ತುಂಬಾ ಇಂಪ್ರೂವ್ ಆಗಿದೆ (My English has improved a lot.)
ಈಗ ಭಯ ಇಲ್ಲ (Now there is no fear.)
ಕಾನ್ಫಿಡೆಂಟ್ ಆಗಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡೋಕೆ ಆಗುತ್ತೆ (I can speak English confidently.)
ಇದು ತುಂಬಾ ಅಫೋರ್ಡಬಲ್ ಇದೆ (This is very affordable.)
ದಿನಕ್ಕೆ ಕೇವಲ 4 ರೂಪಾಯಿ ಮಾತ್ರ (Only 4 rupees per day.)
ನಮಗೆ 7 ದಿನ ಟ್ರಯಲ್ ಕೂಡ ಸಿಗುತ್ತೆ (We also get a 7-day trial.)
ಕಾನ್ಫಿಡೆಂಟ್ ಆಗಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡಬಹುದು (You can speak English confidently.)
